properties.name: Austin Chamber of Commerce
properties.notes: Primary regional chamber supporting economic development, business advocacy, and regional initiatives like Opportunity Austin.
properties.map_location: Downtown Austin near 5th Street / Congress area

properties.name: Austin LGBT Chamber of Commerce
properties.focus_type: Affinity (LGBTQ+ and allied businesses, Central Texas)
properties.notes: Central Texas hub for LGBTQ+ and allied businesses; focuses on marketing, education, community development, and events like Pride in Local Music.
properties.map_location: Downtown Austin near 5th Street / Congress area

properties.name: West Austin Chamber of Commerce
properties.notes: Represents and advocates for businesses in the West Austin corridor (including ZIPs 78726, 78730, 78732, 78750, 78759), focusing on networking, education, and policy issues impacting West Austin.
properties.map_location: Northwest Austin along FM 620 near Lake Travis

properties.name: Pflugerville Chamber of Commerce
properties.notes: Local chamber for the Pflugerville area, now serving as the city’s official Convention and Visitors Bureau and providing business support and promotion.
properties.map_location: Northeast of Austin in Pflugerville / Travis–Williamson County line

properties.name: Round Rock Chamber of Commerce
properties.notes: Economic development-focused chamber for Round Rock, leading business recruitment, expansion, and advocacy in northern Austin metro.
properties.map_location: North of Austin in downtown Round Rock
